title: 京王杯ジュニアSの後に・いざ春へ

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
The crowd has finally been acquainted with my
speed. Which means that from next year...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
I have to give them a once-in-a-lifetime supreme
showdown! I'm finally going to be participating in
the Classics!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
All right! How should I charge into the Satsuki
Sho?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
How about I just go for it immediately?! Charging
straight into a decisive battle is very
Bakushin-like!
choice_data_list: That might be a bit too much Bakushin!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It would certainly be a bit too sudden of a
challenge. So going by the book, it'd be better
to...
choice_data_list:
How about you try your hand at the Spring
Stakes first?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Ooh! That's a race where many outstanding
Umamusume with their eyes set on the Satsuki
Sho will also compete in, right?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Spring Stakes is 1,800 meters. It's longer
than what she usually runs, but it would give her
some time to think and consider various things
before the Satsuki Sho.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: It's a race befitting a model student!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: I understand! I'll join the Spring Stakes next!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
With my speed, I'll be able to blast through the
1,800 meters in an instant!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
It's decided then! Time to start training for
medium-distance races!
